## LibraryRuntime.RuntimeProducedMoldedBonBon.setDecorationChocolate() method

Sets the decoration chocolate. Pushes current state to undo before change, clears redo.

**Signature:**

```typescript
setDecorationChocolate(chocolateId: IngredientId | undefined): Result<void>;
```
